content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学预计于7月21日08:00~11:00（UTC+8）进行校内设施维护。
       维护结束后需要重新登入并更新资源，补给物资将会通过信件向守密人发放。若有任何疑问，欢迎通过校区内客服中心咨询，感谢您的理解与支持！
    
【补给物资】
停服维护补偿：银芯×200、无垢之芯×5
     
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年8月4日09:00。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。
 
【更新内容】
一、活动
【特殊活动：君王的嘉赏】
● 王邸长案备席已齐，诚邀诸位共品这血肉烩就的不朽圣餐！
● 在 7 月 21 日 9:00- 8 月 18 日 9:00 期间，累计登录 7 天即可领取「无垢之芯」×100 的丰厚奖励！
 
【角色活动：杜勒赛因】
● 在 7 月 21 日 9:00 - 8 月 18 日 9:00 期间，以下活动限时开放！
    ○ 角色活动唤醒「万灵宴飨」：血肉界域攻击型唤醒体「杜勒赛因」。
    ○ 命轮活动唤醒「蚀魂誓礼」：命轮「安息之吻」。
    ○ 试玩活动「葬骸之主」：试用「杜勒赛因」。可以领取「银芯」×40、「流明之芯」×1。
● 玩法活动「死灵的美学」将于 7 月 21 日 9:00 - 8 月 4 日 9:00  开放！
    ○ 攻略活动将有机会获得活动限定 SR 命轮「珍馐」与活动限定头像「以银钥之名：杜勒赛因」。
    ○ 活动期间「祭灵节餐品」系列精选礼盒限时上架！
 
【活动复刻：弥利亚姆】
● 在 7 月 28 日 9:00 - 8 月 25 日 9:00 期间，以下唤醒活动限时开放！
    ○ 角色活动唤醒复刻「深渊降诞」：深海界域辅助型唤醒体「弥利亚姆」。
    ○ 命轮活动唤醒复刻「神国谕令」：命轮「虔诚的伟力」。
    ○ 试玩活动复刻「海之使徒」：试用「弥利亚姆」。可以领取「银芯」×40、「流明之芯」×1。
● 在 7 月 28 日 9:00 - 8 月 18 日 9:00  期间，玩法活动复刻「沉渊之祀」限时开放！
    ○ 攻略活动将有机会获得活动限定 SR 命轮「深海的呼唤」与活动限定头像「以银钥之名：弥利亚姆」。
    ○ 活动期间「异梦视界：亵渎」免费解锁开启！
    ○ 活动期间「神殿秘仪」系列精选礼盒限时上架！
 
【学园活动：第二十期】
● 在 7 月 21 日 9:00 - 8 月 18 日 9:00 期间，以下学园活动限时开放！
● 第二十期「学园礼赠」
    ○ 活动期间累计登录 7 天即可领取「流明之芯」×10 的丰厚奖励！累计登录 28 天可获得其他「学园礼赠」升级奖励！
● 第二十期「课题纪录」
    ○ 本期核心课题·限定头像：「永不褪色的昨天：熔毁·朵尔」、「永不褪色的昨天：朵尔」。
    ○ 本期核心课题·限定对战表情：「校园生活篇：旺达·闪亮」、「和平的一天：索蕾尔·嘘」、「快乐弥萨格：艾尔瓦·加油」、「快乐弥萨格：达芙黛尔·请」。
● 第二十赛季「王邸的夜宴」
    ○ 本赛季·限定对战表情：「和平的一天：戈利亚·哟」、「和平的一天：「24」·喵」、「弥萨格日常：N·嘻嘻」、「弥萨格日常：朵尔·休息」。
 
【精选礼盒：养成素材】
● 在 7 月 21 日 9:00- 8 月 18 日 9:00 期间，以下精选礼盒限时上架！
    ○ 特训支援匣：内含「蔷薇金券」×500000，「灵知制剂Ⅲ」×200，「初阶升格匣子」×1000，价格为 「源液」×180。
    ○ 拟态支援匣：内含「蔷薇金券」×1000000，「初阶技能补给」×2400，「拟态凝晶」×1200，价格为 「源液」×300。
    ○ 贤石支援匣：内含「蔷薇金券」×2500000，「贤石碎屑」×1200，价格为 「源液」×680。
    ○ 以上每个精选礼盒活动期间限购 1 次。
 
二、调查
【星辰篇第三章：餍飨】
● 黑雾于沉重的梦境中消弭，宏伟的王城矗立在你身前。满月升至中天，第十三道钟声敲响，食尸鬼们正在墓园中起舞。王城的主人在等待，等待你踏入这场无与伦比的盛宴。
● 第二部「星辰正位之刻」第三章「餍飨」后续内容将于近期逐步开启！
    ○ 第一部分：7 月 21 日。
    ○ 第二部分：7 月 25 日。
    ○ 第三部分：7 月 29 日。
● 通关所有关卡后，即可解锁全新钥令「残忍的致意」。
    ○ 钥令效果：偷取所有敌人 31 点临时力量。如果杜勒赛因在队伍中，还会获得 1 具「残骸」。
 
【忘却篇：追加部分语音】
● 「忘却篇-序章」与「忘却篇-终章」9-13 中追加了全新语音。
● 现在可以重新体验序章，但请注意这不会提供任何奖励。

三、战斗
【血肉界域】
● 「混沌共生·血肉」：回合结束时积攒猩红熔炉效果转移至血肉界域基础机制。
● 「混沌共生·血肉」：混沌唤醒体释放狂气爆发后，增加的胚胎融合由 25% 提高为 35%。
● 「血肉机制」：回合开始时积攒 3% 最大生命的猩红熔炉，若当前界域为「至纯血肉」效果翻倍。
 
【阿格里帕】
● 「苍白的庇佑」护盾由 71 点提高为 89 点，中毒由 59 点提高为 112 点。
● 「启灵 2 - 灰烬与头颅」重做，「基础打击」、「基础防御」不再施加中毒，而是触发所有敌人 10% 中毒。
● 「迷途之旅」护盾由 21 点提高为 28 点。
● 「灵塑适性」获得增强。每回合打出的首张「苍白回旋」胚胎融合 +10%~20%，触发吞噬后使手中的 1 张「苍白回旋」算力消耗降低 1。
 
【希洛】
● 「破链一击」基础伤害由 164 点提高为 272 点，每张打击的基础伤害加成由 25% 降低为 15%，这个加成因为基础伤害提高，实际加成数值不变。
● 「绵长恨怨」基础伤害由 55 点 提高为 68 点，视为「打击」。
● 「灵塑适性」获得增强。希洛对「雪原」敌人造成的最终伤害提高 15%~35%。若本回合希洛消耗过「胚胎」，其本回合下次造成的伤害暴击伤害提高 30~50%，该效果无法叠加。
 
【维度影像】
● 「维度影像-尤乌哈希」额外使尤乌哈希每次释放狂气爆发，狂气消耗降低 5 点。
● 「维度影像-泰旖丝」触发条件由打出 3 张指令卡调整为打出 2 张指令卡，冷却回合不变。

四、综合
【融灾禁区】
● 每个波次都可以在通关后，在相同警报等级的关卡进行额外通关，额外通关后获得 5 特训值。额外通关的队伍同样有着「融灾禁区」无法重复上场的限制法则。
● 累计特训值达到 355/360/365/370/375 时，分别追加了奖励「灵核碎片」×2。累计特训值达到 380/385/390/395/400 时，分别追加了奖励「精粹灵核碎片」×2，「蔷薇金券」×100000。
 
【奖励增强】
● 「社区」中首次访问各个链接时可分别获得 「银芯」×100 。  
● 「手册」中新增系列任务「界域精通 Ⅸ」：将 6 名混沌/深海/血肉/超维界域角色分别提升至 70 级，每个任务可获得「调查徽章」×300、「贤石碎屑」×120。整体完成时可获得「银芯」×200，「无垢之芯」×5，「调查徽章」×1000。
● 「手册」中新增系列任务「界域精通 Ⅹ」：将 6 名混沌/深海/血肉/超维界域角色分别提升至 80 级，每个任务可获得奖励：「调查徽章」×300、「贤石碎屑」×240。整体完成时可获得「银芯」×200，「无垢之芯」×5，「调查徽章」×1000。
● 「福利」中的「学园礼赠」第 14/21/28 天的奖励改为 「调查徽章」×500/1000/1500，第 8~13 / 15~20 / 22~27 天的奖励改为「蔷薇金券」×5000/10000/15000，
● 「弥萨格商店」中每月可兑换的「原初灵核」数量从 5 提升到 10。
 
【智识赠礼】
● 在原有累计提取源液奖励的基础上，追加了以下累计提取源液奖励。
    ○ 累计提取 2000 源液：「原质捕获·忘却篇」×1，「宿命定格·忘却篇」×1。
    ○ 累计提取 4000 源液：「原质捕获·忘却篇」×1，「宿命定格·忘却篇」×1。
    ○ 累计提取 5000 源液：「原质捕获·忘却篇」×1，「宿命定格·忘却篇」×1。
    ○ 累计提取 8000 源液：「原质捕获·忘却篇」×1，「宿命定格·忘却篇」×1。
    ○ 累计提取 13000 源液：「超维映射·忘却篇」×1，「超维预言·忘却篇」×1。
    ○ 累计提取 16000 源液：「血肉诞临·忘却篇」×1，「血肉密语·忘却篇」×1。
    ○ 累计提取 20000 源液：「深海迷影·忘却篇」×1，「深海秘典·忘却篇」×1。
    ○ 累计提取 25000 源液：「混沌回声·忘却篇」×1，「混沌实验·忘却篇」×1。
    ○ 「原质捕获·忘却篇」使用后可免费唤醒1个「忘却篇」中的随机限定唤醒体。
    ○ 「宿命定格·忘却篇」使用后可免费获得1个「忘却篇」中的随机限定命轮。
    ○ 「超维映射·忘却篇」、「血肉诞临·忘却篇」、「深海迷影·忘却篇」、「混沌回声·忘却篇」使用后可分别从中任选1个「忘却篇」中的超维、血肉、深海、混沌界域限定唤醒体免费唤醒。
    ○ 「超维预言·忘却篇」、「血肉密语·忘却篇」、「深海秘典·忘却篇」、「混沌实验·忘却篇」使用后可分别从中任选1个「忘却篇」中的超维、血肉、深海、混沌界域限定命轮免费获得。
● 对此前已经完成「智识赠礼」活动的守密人，该活动将重新上线，并可直接领取已达成的累计提取源液任务的尚未领取的奖励。

【通用功能】
● 「社区」中新增了「特别鸣谢」，并在其中增加了「本地化志愿者」的感谢说明。
● 「守密人档案」中「简介」现在最多支持 140 个英文字符，在「调查行动」记录中会分别列出「普通」、「困难」模式的通关情况，并增加了「融灾禁区」的最高积分记录，「无光之境·间隙」更名为「无光之境」。
● 「通讯器」中角色签名文字过长时会滚动展示，并在通讯过程和结尾时新增了契合的音效。
● 「设置」中新增了「战斗动态背景」图像选项，对背景摇晃敏感的守密人可以尝试关闭该选项。
● 「福利」现在更名为「活动」，且每日登录后不再自动跳转到「学园礼赠」界面。
● 「弥萨格商店」中「特供原质乐园」、「特供轮转之书」、「周常流明供给」下架。   
 
【快捷性优化】
● 「设置」中新增选牌方向、选牌确认、以及特殊界面选项确认的快捷键功能。
● 「无垢之芯」、「流明之芯」的资源栏新增了「+」按钮，点击后可以直接用「银芯」兑换。
● 「手册」、「关卡成就」、「星级评价」等界面中增加了「一键领取」功能。
● 「弥萨格商店」的「金券兑换」中，选择「一键购买」时，可以记住并调整购买选择的物品。
● 「公告」、「唤醒详情」、「物资：密契」等界面中的滚动条更容易被点击和滑动。
● 「公告」中新增了「一键已读」功能与「问题修复」分组。
 
【清晰性优化】
● 敌人详情界面中可以查看「特性」。点击特性可查看针对该特性有利的唤醒体。
● 卡牌的插画变暗、字体颜色变亮、描边效果增强，使卡牌文本描述更为清晰易读。 
● 「尘封旧忆」、「未至遗忘的黎明」以及部分状态的图标进行了调整，现在更独特。
● 「唤醒体」界面中长按唤醒体技能的单张卡牌可以到预览卡牌详情与关联的词缀说明，此外「技能」、「启灵」界面细节有所改善，展示内容更清晰。
● 「唤醒」现在会直接在结果界面中展示获得的根源沉淀或溢出资源，不再会弹窗，「银辉初耀」新手角色唤醒活动的背景颜色调整为青色，避免与血肉界域混淆。
● 「派遣」界面中点击「一键领取」时，现在会弹出「获得物资」窗口，展示获得的所有奖励。
● 「调查完成」界面中，可通过同调率获取的详情按钮来查看当前队伍中同调率已满的唤醒体。
● 「典藏馆」各种收藏分类入口上增加了当前收集与最大收集数量信息展示。
● 「意识潜游」的篇章现在会按照关卡的开放时间排序。 
● 「通讯器」的通讯内容展示位置不再会因为对话选项出现而突然变化。  
● 「守密人档案」中「追随者」、「点赞数」、「助战次数」数字展示效果更加清晰。
● 「简约幻衣绘形券」过期后，会在守密人首次打开「物资」界面时自动弹出回收转换提示。

五、问题修复
【战斗问题修复】
● 修复了唤醒体「凯刻斯」启灵3「不被接纳之痛」、唤醒体「萨尔瓦多」启灵3「予以救赎」、命轮「伤痛之鳍」、「无声欢宴」、「血肉狂宴」、密契「无垢启示录」提供的「体质」相关增益，未享受唤醒体灵塑适性属性加成的问题。
● 修复了使用「银钥微光」、「银钥曦光」选择了「门扉的答案」后，会将队伍原始携带的钥令替换为「尘封旧忆」、「未至遗忘的黎明」的问题。
● 修复了释放「未至遗忘的黎明」将「双发钥令」状态错误消耗掉的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「索蕾尔」激活启灵3时，其它唤醒体造成的主动伤害也能够在本回合提高「索蕾尔」伤害值的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「熔毁·朵尔」在某些情况下释放超限狂气爆发未能播放语音的问题。
● 修复了命轮「不可承受的自由」进入下一场战斗时未重置三回合冷却效果的问题。
● 修复了星辰篇造物「维度影像 · 奥尔拉」隐喻效果的文本描述与实际效果不符的问题。
● 修复了星辰篇造物「维度影像 · 艾继丝」偷取力量效果未享受「归档刻痕」增幅的问题。
● 修复了星辰篇造物「蒙尘缝纫机」、「知无不言」每过一场战斗都会错误提高作用次数的问题。
● 修复了星辰篇造物「救济之肢」、「行道之骸」未能享受造物中毒、反击加成效果的问题。
● 修复了星辰篇造物「虫群意识」文本描述，未明确说明承受的中毒层数为固定值的问题。
● 修复了怪物「宁菲亚」缺少复活次数标识的问题。
● 修复了怪物「圣婴」造成伤害可能是负数的问题。
● 修复了怪物附加「彩墨」的卡牌会错误跳出「怨恨锁链」词缀的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中部分命轮卡面的底部边缘显示不正确的问题，包括「伊萨拉乌的目光」「镜中人」「银鳕鱼的决心」「深海的呼唤」「待到雪山消融」。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中命轮「深海的呼唤」与技能「异常引力」会产生不正确交互的问题。
 
【综合问题修复】
● 修复了「回溯」有「超限因果」效果的命轮时，该命轮没有正确从编队中移除的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒体」同调率有时候能够超过 42000 最大值的问题。
● 修复了「编队」使用助战时，界域冲突的唤醒体右上方「最近助战」标签可能会被遮挡的问题。
● 修复了「典藏馆」阅读「角色」和「洪积禁典」详细内容时，首个条目的“新”标识必须重点一次才会消失的问题。
● 修复了「典藏馆」中「留声机」在曲目界面，关闭界面的货币栏动画有延迟、以及正在播放曲目标识动效拖动效果不正确的问题。
● 修复了获取唤醒体溢出时，自动分解获得的材料没有正确将「原初灵核碎片」显示的问题。
● 修复了教程中有几率触发错误引导导致无法正常编队的问题。
V2.3.0.0 Maintenance Announcement

Dear Keeper,
Mythag University is scheduled to conduct campus facility maintenance from 08:00 to 11:00 on July 21 (UTC+8).
You can enter the game once the maintenance is complete. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Server Maintenance Compensation: Silver*1000, Pure Core*5
 
[Claim Conditions]
The collection period ends on August 4, 2025 at 09:00. Please remember to check your mailbox in time to collect the supplies.
 
[Update Content]
I. Events  
[Special Event: Monarch's Favor]  
● The royal banquet is prepared, inviting all to savor this immortal feast of flesh!  
● From 9:00 on July 21 to 9:00 on August 18, log in cumulatively for 7 days to receive a generous reward of "Pure Core" ×100!  
 
[Character Event: Doresain]  
● From 9:00 on July 21 to 9:00 on August 18, the following events will be available for a limited time!  
    ○ Character Event Awakening "Pandemonium Feast": Flesh Realm Attack-type Awakener "Doresain".  
    ○ WoD Event Awakening "Oath of the Hollowed": Wheel of Destiny "Kiss of Repose".  
    ○ Trial Event "Lord of Necrovia": Try out "Doresain". Rewards include "Silver" ×40, "Luminous Core" ×1.  
● Gameplay Event "Necrotic Aesthetics" will be available from 9:00 on July 21 to 9:00 on August 4!  
    ○ Complete event stages to have a chance to obtain the event-limited SR Wheel of Destiny "Macabre Delicacies" and the event-limited Avatar "By the Silver Key: Doresain".  
    ○ During the event, the "Soulsfeast Banquet" series of limited-time premium gift boxes will be available for purchase!

[Event Rerun: Miryam]  
● From 9:00 on July 28 to 9:00 on August 25, the following Awakening events will be available for a limited time!  
    ○ Character Event Awakening Rerun "Abyssal Descent": Deep Sea Realm Chorus-type Awakener "Miryam".  
    ○ WoD Event Awakening Rerun "Celestial Decree": Wheel of Destiny "Power of the Pious".  
    ○ Trial Event Rerun "Apostle of the Sea": Try out "Miryam". Rewards include "Silver" ×40, "Luminous Core" ×1.  
● From 9:00 on July 28 to 9:00 on August 18, the gameplay event rerun "Abyss Sacrifice" will be available for a limited time!  
    ○ Complete event stages to have a chance to obtain the event-limited SR Wheel of Destiny "Deep Sea's Call" and the event-limited Avatar "By the Silver Key: Miryam".  
    ○ During the event, "Dreamscape: Desecrate" will be unlocked for free!  
    ○ During the event, the "Temple Ritual" series of limited-time premium gift boxes will be available for purchase!  
 
[Mythag Event: Season 20]  
● From 9:00 on July 21 to 9:00 on August 18, the following Mythag events will be available for a limited time!  
● Season 20 "Gifts from Mythag"  
    ○ During the event, log in cumulatively for 7 days to receive a generous reward of "Luminous Core" ×10! Log in cumulatively for 28 days to obtain additional "Gifts from Mythag" upgrade rewards!  
● Season 20 "Curriculum"  
    ○ This season's Premium Topics - Limited Avatar: "Unfading Yesterday: Doll: Inferno", "Unfading Yesterday: Doll".  
    ○ This season's Premium Topics - Limited Traphase Emote: "School Life: Wanda: Bling Bling", "Peaceful Day: Sorel: Shh", "Happy Mythag: Alva: Nice", "Happy Mythag: Daffodil: Sure".  
● Season 20 "The King's Banquet"  
    ○ This season's Limited Traphase Emote: "Peaceful Day: Goliath: Heyo!", "Peaceful Day: "24": Meow", "Mythag Daily: N: Pfft", "Mythag Daily: Doll: Eepy".

[Premium Gift Boxes: Development Materials]  
● From 9:00 on July 21 to 9:00 on August 18, the following premium gift boxes will be available for a limited time!  
    ○ Training Casket: Contains "Rose Scrip" ×500,000, "Gnosis Elixir III" ×200, "Basic Edify Box" ×1,000. Price: "Silver Prime" ×180.  
    ○ Mimicry Casket: Contains "Rose Scrip" ×1,000,000, "Basic Skill Supplies" ×2,400, "Mimetic Crystal" ×1,200. Price: "Silver Prime" ×300.  
    ○ Aetheric Casket: Contains "Rose Scrip" ×2,500,000, "Aetheric Shard" ×1,200. Price: "Silver Prime" ×680.  
    ○ Each of the above premium gift boxes is limited to 1 purchase per event period.

II. Investigation  
[Astral Reign Chapter 3: Ossuary Gala]  
● The black mist dissipates within the heavy dream, and the magnificent royal city stands before you. The full moon rises to its zenith, the thirteenth bell tolls, and the ghouls dance in the cemetery. The master of the royal city is waiting, waiting for you to step into this unparalleled feast.  
● The continuation of Part 2 "When the Stars Are Right" Chapter 3 "Ossuary Gala" will gradually unlock soon!  
    ○ Part 1: July 21  
    ○ Part 2: July 25  
    ○ Part 3: July 29  
● After clearing all stages, you can unlock the new Posse "Cruel Homage".  
    ○ Posse Effect: Steal 31 points of Temporary Strength from all enemies. If Doresain is in the party, gain 1 "Corpse".  
 
[Faded Legacy: Additional Voice Lines]  
● New voice lines have been added to "Faded Legacy - Prologue" and "Faded Legacy - Epilogue" sections 9-13.  
● You can now replay the prologue, but please note that no rewards will be provided.
 
III. Battle
[Caro Realm]
● "Chaos Symbiosis: Caro": At the end of the turn, accumulated Crimson Furnace effects are transferred to the base mechanism of Caro Realm.
● "Chaos Symbiosis: Caro": After an Awakener unleashes Exalt, the increased Embryo Fusion is increased from 25% to 35%.
● "Caro Mechanism": At the start of the turn, accumulate Crimson Furnace equal to 3% of Max HP. If the current Realm is "Pure Caro", this effect is doubled.

[Agrippa]
● "Pale Blessing" Shield increased from 71 to 89. Poison increased from 59 to 112.
● "Enlighten 2 - Ashes and Skulls" reworked. "Basic Strike" and "Basic Defence" no longer apply Poison, instead applying 10% Poison to all enemies.
● "Path of the Lost" Shield increased from 21 to 28.
● "Soulforge Aptitude" enhanced. The first "Colorless Spiral" played each turn gains +10%~20% Embryo Fusion. After Devouring, reduce the Arithmetica Cost of 1 "Colorless Spiral" in hand by 1.
[Helot]
● "Shattering Strike" Base DMG increased from 164 to 272. Base DMG Buff per Strike reduced from 25% to 15%. Due to the increased Base DMG, the actual DMG increase remains unchanged.
● "Lasting Loathe" Base DMG increased from 55 to 68 and is now considered a Strike.
● "Soulforge Aptitude" enhanced. Helot's Final DMG against "Snowfield" enemies increased by 15%~35%. If Helot consumed an "Embryo" this turn, its next DMG this turn gains +30~50% Crit. DMG. This effect cannot stack.
[Dimensional Image]
● "Dimensional Image - Uvhash" additionally reduces Uvhash's Aliemus Cost by 5 each time he unleashes Exalt.
● "Dimensional Image - Thais" trigger condition changed from playing 3 Command Cards to playing 2 Command Cards. Cooldown remains unchanged.

Ⅳ. Comprehensive
[D-Effect Zone]
● After completing each wave, you can perform an additional clear on stages of the same Alert Level. Completing an additional clear grants 5 Training Points. The team used for additional clears is also subject to the restriction rule of the "D-Effect Zone" that prevents repeating deployed units.
● When cumulative Training Points reach 355/360/365/370/375 respectively, additional rewards of "Gnosis Fragment" ×2 are granted. When cumulative Training Points reach 380/385/390/395/400 respectively, additional rewards of "Refined Gnosis Fragment" ×2 and "Rose Scrip" ×100,000 are granted.
[Reward Enhancement]
● Visiting each link in the "Community" for the first time grants "Silver" ×100 separately.
● A new series of tasks "Realm Mastery Ⅸ" has been added to the "Handbook": Raise 6 Chaos/Deep Sea/Caro/Ultra Realm characters to level 70 respectively. Each task grants "Investigation Badge" ×300 and "Aetheric Shard" ×120. Upon completing all tasks, you will receive "Silver" ×200, "Pure Core" ×5, and "Investigation Badge" ×1000.
● A new series of tasks "Realm Mastery Ⅹ" has been added to the "Handbook": Raise 6 Chaos/Deep Sea/Caro/Ultra Realm characters to level 80 respectively. Each task grants rewards of "Investigation Badge" ×300 and "Aetheric Shard" ×240. Upon completing all tasks, you will receive "Silver" ×200, "Pure Core" ×5, and "Investigation Badge" ×1000.
● The rewards for Day 14/21/28 of the "Academy Gift" in "Goods" have been changed to "Investigation Badge" ×500/1000/1500. The rewards for Days 8~13 / 15~20 / 22~27 have been changed to "Rose Scrip" ×5000/10000/15000.
● The monthly redeemable amount of "Gnosis Primer" in the "Mythag Shop" has been increased from 5 to 10.

[Gift of Knowledge]
● Based on the original cumulative Silver Prime extraction rewards, the following cumulative Silver Prime extraction rewards have been added:
    ○ Cumulative extraction of 2000 Silver Prime: "Sepirot Capture·Faded Legacy" ×1, "Fate Frozen in Time·Faded Legacy" ×1.
    ○ Cumulative extraction of 4000 Silver Prime: "Sepirot Capture·Faded Legacy" ×1, "Fate Frozen in Time·Faded Legacy" ×1.
    ○ Cumulative extraction of 5000 Silver Prime: "Sepirot Capture·Faded Legacy" ×1, "Fate Frozen in Time·Faded Legacy" ×1.
    ○ Cumulative extraction of 8000 Silver Prime: "Sepirot Capture·Faded Legacy" ×1, "Fate Frozen in Time·Faded Legacy" ×1.
    ○ Cumulative extraction of 13000 Silver Prime: "Ultra Mapping·Faded Legacy" ×1, "Ultra Prophecy·Faded Legacy" ×1.
    ○ Cumulative extraction of 16000 Silver Prime: "Caro Birth·Faded Legacy" ×1, "Caro Whisper·Faded Legacy" ×1.
    ○ Cumulative extraction of 20000 Silver Prime: "Deep Sea Mystery·Faded Legacy" ×1, "Aequor Codex·Faded Legacy" ×1.
    ○ Cumulative extraction of 25000 Silver Prime: "Chaos Echo·Faded Legacy" ×1, "Chaos Experiment·Faded Legacy" ×1.
    ○ Using "Sepirot Capture·Faded Legacy" allows you to freely awaken a random limited Awakener from the "Faded Legacy."
    ○ Using "Fate Frozen in Time·Faded Legacy" allows you to freely obtain a random limited Wheel of Destiny from the "Faded Legacy."
    ○ Using "Ultra Mapping·Faded Legacy," "Caro Birth·Faded Legacy," "Deep Sea Mystery·Faded Legacy," or "Chaos Echo·Faded Legacy" allows you to freely awaken one Ultra, Caro, Deep Sea, or Chaos Realm limited Awakener from the "Faded Legacy" respectively.
    ○ Using "Ultra Prophecy·Faded Legacy," "Caro Whisper·Faded Legacy," "Aequor Codex·Faded Legacy," or "Chaos Experiment·Faded Legacy" allows you to freely obtain one Ultra, Caro, Deep Sea, or Chaos Realm limited Wheel of Destiny from the "Faded Legacy" respectively.

● For Keepers who have already completed the "Gift of Knowledge" event, this event will be reactivated, allowing you to directly claim unclaimed rewards for completed cumulative Silver Prime extraction tasks.
 
[General Features]
● A new "Special Acknowledgments" section has been added to the "Community," including a thank-you message for "Localization Volunteers."
● The "Keeper's Archives" now supports up to 140 English characters in the "Profile" section. The "Investigation" records now separately list completion statuses for "Normal" and "Hard" modes. A new maximum score record for the "D-Effect Zone" has been added. "Lightless Realm·Interval" has been renamed to "Lightless Realm."
● Character signatures in the "Communicator" will scroll if they are too long. New sound effects have been added during and at the end of communications.
● A new "Dynamic Battle Background" image option has been added to "Settings." Keepers who are sensitive to background shaking can try disabling this option.
● "Goods" has been renamed to "Events." After daily login, it no longer automatically redirects to the "Gifts from Mythag" interface.
● "Exclusive Protoparadise," "Exclusive Book of Rotation," and "Weekly Luminous Pack" have been removed from the "Mythag Shop."

[Convenience Optimizations]
● New shortcut key functions for card selection direction, card selection confirmation, and special interface confirmations have been added to "Settings."
● A "+" button has been added to the resource bars for "Pure Core" and "Luminous Core," allowing direct exchange using "Silver."
● A "One-Click Claim" function has been added to interfaces such as the "Handbook," "Stage Achievements," and "Star Ratings."
● In the "Gold Scrip Exchange" section of the "Mythag Shop," selecting "One-Click Purchase" allows you to remember and adjust the selected items for purchase.
● Scroll bars in interfaces such as "Announcements," "Awakening Details," and "Resources: Covenant" are now easier to click and slide.
● A new "One-Click Mark as Read" function and a "Bug Fixes" category have been added to the "Announcements."

[Clarity Optimizations]
● The enemy details interface now displays "Traits." Clicking on a trait allows you to view Awakener recommendations for countering that trait.
● Card illustrations have been darkened, text colors brightened, and outline effects enhanced to improve readability of card descriptions.
● Icons for "Buried Memories," "Unforgotten Twilight," and some states have been adjusted to be more unique.
● In the "Awakener" interface, long-pressing a single card of an Awakener's skill allows previewing the card details and related affix descriptions. Additionally, details in the "Skill" and "Enlighten" interfaces have been improved for clearer content display.
● "Awakening" now directly displays obtained Radix Sediment or overflow resources in the result interface without pop-up windows. The background color for the "First-Time Character Awakening" event "Argent Dawnlight" has been changed to cyan to avoid confusion with the Caro Realm.
● In the "Assignment" interface, clicking "One-Click Claim" now pops up a "Resource Obtained" window displaying all rewards obtained.
● In the "Investigation Completed" interface, a details button based on Affinity allows viewing Awakener with full Affinity in the current party.
● Current collection and maximum collection counts have been added to the entry points for various collection categories in the "Gallery."
● The chapters in "Psyche Deepdive" are now sorted by stage unlock time.
● The display position of communication content in the "Communicator" no longer changes suddenly due to dialogue options.
● The display effects for numbers in the "Keeper's Archives" under "Followers," "Likes," and "Assist Count" are now clearer.
● When "Basic Skin Voucher" expires, a prompt for automatic recycling and conversion will pop up the first time the Keeper opens the "Resources" interface.

V. Bug Fixes
[Battle Bug Fixes]
● Fixed an issue where the "CON" related buffs provided by Awakener "Caecus" Enlighten 3 "Outcast's Anguish", Awakener "Salvador" Enlighten 3 "Salvation's Hand", Wheel of Destiny "Fin of Sorrow", "Silent Banquet", "Bloody Feast", and Covenant "Unstained Chronicle" did not receive the Soulforge Aptitude attribute bonus from Awakener.
● Fixed an issue where selecting "The Gated Answer" after using "Silver Key Gleam" or "Silver Key Dawn" would replace the team's original Posse with "Forgotten Memories" and "Unforgotten Twilight".
● Fixed an issue where using "Unforgotten Twilight" would incorrectly consume the "Dual Posse" state.
● Fixed an issue where Awakener "Sorel" activating Enlighten 3 would also increase "Sorel's" DMG value for the turn from active DMG dealt by other Awakeners.
● Fixed an issue where Awakener "Doll: Inferno" might not play voice lines when using Over-Exaltation.
● Fixed an issue where Wheel of Destiny "Unbearable Freedom" would not reset its 3-turn cooldown effect when entering the next battle.
● Fixed an issue where the text description of the Metaphor effect for Astral Reign Relic "Dimensional Image · Horla" did not match the actual effect.

● Fixed an issue where the STR Steal effect of Astral Reign Relic "Dimensional Image · Aigis" did not receive the "Archive Mark" enhancement.
● Fixed an issue where the effect usage count of Astral Reign Relics "Forgotten Loom" and "Truth Unbound" would incorrectly increase after each battle.
● Fixed an issue where Astral Reign Relics "Salvific Limb" and "Pathwalker's Remains" could not benefit from the Poison and Counter Buff effects of Relics.
● Fixed an issue where the text description of Astral Reign Relic "Swarm Mind" did not clearly indicate that the number of Poison stacks received was a fixed value.
● Fixed an issue where Monster "Nymphaea" was missing the resurrection count indicator.
● Fixed an issue where Monster "Divine Fetus" could deal negative DMG.
● Fixed an issue where Relic cards with added "Paint" would incorrectly trigger the "Chains of Resentment" affix.
● Fixed an issue where the bottom edges of some Wheel of Destiny cards in "Traphase" were displayed incorrectly, including "The Gaze of Isarawu", "Man in the Mirror", "Silver Cod's Determination", "Deep Sea's Call", and "Til the Snow Melts".
● Fixed an issue where the Wheel of Destiny "Deep Sea's Call" and the skill "Anomalous Gravity" could produce incorrect interactions in "Traphase".

[General Bug Fixes]
● Fixed an issue where a Wheel of Destiny with the "Over-Causality" effect was not correctly removed from the lineup when using "Rewind".
● Fixed an issue where an Awakener's Affinity could sometimes exceed the maximum value of 42,000.
● Fixed an issue where the "Recent Buddy" tag for Awakeners with Realm conflicts might be obscured when using Buddy Support in "Lineup".
● Fixed an issue where the "New" indicator for the first entry in "Collection" would only disappear after being tapped once when viewing detailed content for "Characters" and "After Flood Prohibitions".
● Fixed an issue where the currency bar animation on the Phonograph's track interface in "Collection" had a delay when closing the interface, and the animation effect dragging for the currently playing track was incorrect.
● Fixed an issue where the "Gnosis Fragment" was not correctly displayed when automatically decomposing overflowed Awakeners.
● Fixed an issue where tutorial errors could occasionally lead to incorrect guidance, preventing normal team formation.
